title: Bauer Professional Hair Clipper and Grooming Kits for Men/High Precision and Adjustable Lengths/Stainless Steel Blades/Accessories Included (Hair Clipper Travel Set)
features: TRAVEL HAIR CLIPPER SET – This hair clipper set includes a stainless-steel cutting head and 11 detachable clipper combs between 1.5-25mm, to suit most desired hair lengths, plus accessories to cover all your hair grooming needs.

ACCESSORIES INCLUDED – As well as the 11 detachable clippers, the set includes 2 barber combs, 1 moustache comb, scissors, a cleaning brush, cleaning gel, 1 eyebrow comb, left and right ear comb, protection cap, 2 hair clips, 1 neck brush and barber cape.

HIGH PRECISION AND ADJUSTABLE CONTROL TAPER – The stainless-steel blades provide a fast and accurate cutting performance, giving you a precise, smooth, and comfortable grooming experience. The adjustable control taper lever can be used for blending and precision cutting to achieve a sleek fade haircut.

EASY TO STORE AND TRANSPORT – The set comes complete with a stylish pouch so you can easily store your set when not in use. It also makes it easy to transport for when you need to use your grooming kit on the go. The long 1.8m cord provides you with great coverage when using your hair clippers.
BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of top-quality hair, beauty & personal care products. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Hair Clipper and Grooming Sets Accessories Included These hair clipper and grooming sets from Bauer Professional include everything you need to get a salon-quality trim from home. With stainless-steel blades that move smoothly over skin to reduce irritation, you can enjoy a comfortable and precise hair grooming experience. Giving you total control, each set includes detachable clipper combs of various sizes to suit your desired hair length, plus accessories to cover all of your hair grooming needs. Choose from the 3 styles available. KEY FEATURES: High precision and adjustable lengths Stainless steel blades Accessories included Rechargable Salon quality HAIR CLIPPER SET This clipper set includes a stainless-steel cutting head and 4 detachable clipper combs 3, 6, 9, and 12mm, plus accessories. 6 IN 1 GROOMING SET Includes 1 x large trimmer, 1 x small trimmer, 1 x nose trimmer, 1 x body trimmer, 1 x precision trimmer, and 1 x shaver trimmer, plus accessories and storage stand. HAIR CLIPPER TRAVEL SET Includes a stainless-steel cutting head and 11 detachable clipper combs between 1.5-25mm, to suit most desired hair lengths, plus accessories and travel bag.
